---
title: "Welcome"
---

# Welcome to *Python for Beginners*

Welcome! This course is designed for complete beginners who want to learn real Python by writing lots of code.

## What you will learn

By the end of the first part of the course you will be able to:

- write and run Python programs
- use variables and arithmetic
- ask the user for input
- make decisions with `if`
- repeat code with loops
- work with lists

## How to use this course

1. Work through the lessons **in order**.
2. Type every example into Positron yourself.
3. Complete the exercises **before** opening the hints.
4. Only look at the solutions if you are really stuck.
5. Try the challenge exercises—they are where the real learning happens.

## Course outline

1. Getting Started with Positron
2. Lesson 1 – Your First Python Program
3. Lesson 2 – Making Python Interactive
4. Lesson 3 – Making Decisions with `if`
5. Lesson 4 – Repeating Code with Loops
6. Lesson 5 – Lists and `for` Loops

Good luck, and have fun!
